$comment: Reviewed WARNING waivers for the OIDF conformance gate (parse_results.py).
A WARNING for a test listed here, WITH a written reason, is downgraded to a
pass-with-note; every other WARNING blocks the merge gate as 'unreviewed'.
Only WARNING is waivable: REVIEW, FAILED, and SKIPPED can never be waived.
Adding an entry is a reviewed change (it goes through the same PR review as
code). Keep this list empty unless a warning is a known, tracked suite quirk.
Each entry: {"test": "<exact test name>", "reason": "<why, with an issue link>", "reviewer": "<who>"}.
